CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance by Plaintiff counsel. Appearance by Defendant Irma Studebaker. Notice having been given and there being no objection, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)
